untranslatable_reason: Signal requires mean-reverting pair trading on AUD.CAD with overnight rollover interest cost adjustment (formula 5.6). This requires: (1) dual-symbol pair construction not supported by single-symbol indicator set, (2) interest rate differential modeling (i_BQ(t)) not available in allowed indicators, (3) specific entry/exit thresholds marked AUTHOR_SILENT, (4) half-life parameter for mean-reversion decay not computable from allowed indicators, (5) log-return spread calculation with interest adjustments requires custom pair construction logic unavailable in backtest engine. The formula-driven approach cannot be translated into discrete indicator conditions.
translation_notes: The source material (equation 5.6) defines a position return incorporating log price changes and overnight interest costs: r(t+1) = {log(y_BQ(t+1)) - log(y_BQ(t)) - log(1+i_BQ(t)) - log(1+i_Q(t))}. This is a sophisticated pair-trading mechanism requiring dual-currency feeds, interest rate data, and spread-based mean-reversion logic. The signal author has not provided concrete entry triggers, exit rules, lookback periods, or thresholds (all marked AUTHOR_SILENT). Without these parameters and without pair-construction or interest-rate indicators in the allowed set, this signal cannot be operationalized.
